title: Mekanism Rotten Flesh Crusher Conversion
description: Brings back rotten flesh to bio fuel crushing!
body:
![Mod Discord URL](https://img.shields.io/discord/870058549177372703?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=red)

_After many user requests, I am beginning to slowly migrate my past projects over to Modrinth from [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/derexxd/projects?page=1&sortBy=TotalDownloads) where they've lived for years. This was one of my first mods I coded in high school for college apps!_

Using the Crusher to Crush rotten flesh into biofuel used to be a mekanism feature but was removed as they wanted the biofuel generation to be based on the composter in Minecraft. This addon simply just adds that feature back, allowing you to crush 1 rotten flesh into 2 biofuel.



You can make good use of zombie farms combined with contraptions like dark utilities!



You can use this in modpacks as long as you credit both this addon and Mekanism 



 

[Join our modding discord](https://discord.gg/HM5XEe6pW6)!  (dm me about the SMP if interested)



Also if you liked the mod and want to see my progress a simple follow would do!



❤️ Credits: Developed by Derex... or derex_, derec4, derexXD, dereXD, derexwq, DereC_, CORRUPT_Greninja, lordnexus123, or whatever iteration of my username we are on at this point.
